articles.title: Celebrated British artist David Hockney dies aged 88
articles.description: Hockney, one of the UK's most important and influential artists, has died at the age of 88.

articles.title: Ministers want 60% of children walking or cycling to school by 2035
articles.description: Thousands of safer paths and crossings are promised to help people become more active in England's towns and cities.

articles.title: Grooming survivors left with criminal records still being failed, BBC told
articles.description: Victims who were abused and prosecuted as children are still being failed, says grooming report author.

articles.title: Donaldson denies meeting sex abuse accuser to 'nip in the bud' allegations
articles.description: Sir Jeffrey Donaldson, the former Democratic Unionist Party (DUP) leader, is on trial for 18 sex abuse charges, including one count of rape, all of which he denies.
